channel.title: XKey Updates
channel.description: XKey - Vietnamese Input Method for macOS

item.title: Version 1.2.21 (Build 20260412)
item.description:
What's New

fix: add session-aware event tap for multi-user macOS (Fast User Switching)

Problem:

XKey uses .cghidEventTap (HID level) which intercepts ALL keyboard events

system-wide, including those from other macOS user sessions. When user A

has XKey active and switches to user B, XKey continues to "steal" keystrokes

from user B, causing missing characters and incorrect input method switching.

Solution:

  • Add session monitoring via NSWorkspace notifications

(sessionDidResignActiveNotification / sessionDidBecomeActiveNotification)

  • Cache session state as isSessionOnConsole boolean (O(1) check per keystroke)
  • Guard event callback to pass-through all events when off-console
  • Reset engine buffer on session return via sessionDidBecomeActive() delegate
  • Move tapDisabledByTimeout handler before session guard for robustness
  • Use typed kCGSessionOnConsoleKey constant instead of hardcoded string

Testing:

  • Add 15 unit tests (SessionMonitoringTests, KeyboardEventHandlerSessionTests,

EventTapDelegateDefaultTests) covering state transitions, delegate callbacks,

cleanup, and edge cases

Debug:

  • Show plist settings file path in debug window config summary to verify

per-user isolation (App Group containers are per-user by design)

Xem chi tiết trên GitHub
